data.executiveSummary: The frontend-web service is currently experiencing extremely high CPU usage while maintaining normal error rates, which could lead to degraded performance or outages if not addressed quickly.

rootCause.title: High CPU Usage
rootCause.description: The system CPU usage has averaged 94.97% over the last 30 minutes, indicating a significant overload. This is likely the root cause of potential performance degradation.

evidenceChain: Step 1: Checked Prometheus metrics for system CPU usage showing an average of 94.97% over the past 30 minutes.
Step 2: Memory usage is at 70.31%, which is stable and not contributing to the current issue.

timeline.event: Prometheus metric query executed indicating persistent high CPU usage.

data.impact: Users may experience performance issues due to CPU resource exhaustion, although no increase in error rate has been observed.
recommendedActions: Investigate and optimize the code paths or workloads causing the high CPU usage.
Consider scaling up resources or load distribution approaches to reduce CPU load.
